name: quale
doc: Silent control lane: switches the active quale per event (fuzzy id/name match). Stack it next to your audio; honors the transition + quantize settings. "null" selects the null quale — a blank fx layer for a breathing gap between visuals.
example:
stack(
  s("bd*4"),
  quale("<chladni null fractal galaxy>").slow(8),
)

name: qset
doc: Silent control lane: drives a param of the ACTIVE quale from pattern values. Continuous signals need .segment(n) to become events.
example:
stack(
  s("bd sd"),
  qset("hue", sine.range(0, 1).segment(16)),
  qset("palette", "<violet cyan>").slow(4),
)

name: qpreset
doc: Silent control lane: applies the active quale's factory or user presets by name per event.

name: qphase
doc: Silent control lane: steps the active quale's phase per event (value is direction, ±1). Same walk as the topbar phase button.

name: qglitch
doc: Silent control lane: sets a glitch post's mode per event. Glitches: ascii, mosh, edge, stitch, negative. Modes: off, on, blip, flip.

name: qcall
doc: Silent control lane: calls fn(value, hap) per event at its audible time — the generic escape hatch into the whole qualia API.

name: qtrig
doc: Chainable, KEEPS the audio: fires fn(value, hap) on each event of the pattern it's chained to. Hang visual hits off a sounding line.

name: qualia.quale
doc: Get the active quale id, or switch by id/name (fuzzy). Uses the same transition + cycle-quantize path as the topbar select.

name: qualia.quales / next / prev / random / null
doc: quales() lists [{id,name}]; nextQuale()/prevQuale() step the dropdown order; randomQuale() jumps somewhere new (never the null quale); nullQuale() blanks the fx layer — Hydra + overlay stay live.

name: qualia.set
doc: Set param(s) on the ACTIVE quale — the ergonomic form of setParam. Param ids come from qualia.params().

name: qualia.get / params
doc: get(id) reads the live RESOLVED value (base ⊕ audio/pose modulators); get() returns all. params() lists the active quale's param specs.

name: qualia.setParam
doc: The original explicit-target param hook — still the right call when addressing a quale that may not be active.

name: qualia.preset / savePreset
doc: preset() lists {factory, user} preset names for the active quale; preset(name) applies one; savePreset(name) snapshots the current sliders.

name: qualia.phase / autoPhase
doc: phase(±1) steps the active quale's phase now. autoPhase(seconds, style) arms the timer (0 = off; styles: sequential, palettes, random).

name: qualia.autoCycle
doc: Auto-swap the quale itself every N seconds (0 = off; styles: sequential, random, progressive).

name: qualia.transition / quantize
doc: How scene changes land: transition('cut'|'dissolve'|'wipe', ms). quantize('cycle') holds every scene change for the next Strudel cycle boundary.

name: qualia.overlay / sparkStyle
doc: Toggle the overlay layers: skeleton, sparks, aura, ripples. sparkStyle('dots'|'emmons'|'shobud') picks the spark shape.

name: qualia.glitch
doc: Glitch posts by mode: ascii/mosh/edge/stitch/negative × off/on/blip/flip (blip + flip react to hard kicks). No args → all modes.

name: qualia.mosh / edge / stitch
doc: Read or patch the glitch tunables, e.g. mosh({intensity, smear, blockSize}), edge({threshold, glow}), stitch({cellSize, palette, words}).

name: qualia.logo / logoConfig
doc: The logo-mark layer: logo(true/false) toggles, logoConfig({position, size, opacity, glow, caption, ...}) styles it.

name: qualia.blackout / zen / pause / fullscreen
doc: Stage state. blackout: screen dark, audio keeps running. zen: hide the UI chrome. pause: brake visuals + transports. All read back with no args.

name: qualia.theme
doc: Site theme (16 available — qualia.themes() lists ids). cycleTheme(±1) steps through them.

name: qualia.channels / channel / bands / crowd
doc: Live modulation-channel reads for conditionals in patterns: audio.*, pose.*, crowd.*, time.*. bands() and crowd() snapshot the field directly.

name: qualia.cam.walk / walkConfig
doc: The camera-walk drift (compositor pan/zoom/rotate). walkConfig patches feel: {drift, zoom, rotate, punch, minGapS, maxGapS, hydra, pose, post}.

name: qualia.cam.source / rotate / mirror / flip / zoom
doc: Physical camera: source('camera'|'off') starts/stops the feed, rotate(0|90|180|270), mirror(bool), flip() swaps user/environment, zoom(v) where supported.

name: qualia.pose.*
doc: Pose pipeline: smoothing(0..1), poses(1..6), thresholds({detect,presence,track}), linger(ms), fps(1..60 inference rate), people() → tracked count.

name: qualia.entangle.*
doc: Audience entanglement: open()/close() the room, mode('pose'|'param'|'vote'|'phase'|'skeleton', on), autoVote(on), whitelist(paramId) toggles crowd-drivable params, peers(), room().

name: qualia.audio.mode / preset / tunables
doc: Reactivity source: mode('off'|'mic'|'mix'|'all'). preset('default'|'ambient'|'acoustic'|'edm'|'metal') tunes band/beat response; tunables({gain, ema, thresh, cooldown}) fine-tunes.

name: qualia.audio.levels / clipping
doc: Per-track meters {mic,rig,looper,strudel,sequencer,vocoder} → {peak, clipping}, and the global clip flag.

name: qualia.mixer.*
doc: Board-level mix: setLevel/setMuted/setLimiter by track id ('mic','rig','strudel','seq','vox'), open()/close() the panel, isClipping().

name: qualia.strudel.*
doc: This panel from code: play()/stop()/playing(), cps(v), volume(0..1.5), mute(on), limiter(on). cps is the same clock the sequencer follows.

name: qualia.seq.*
doc: Sequencer: play/stop/playing, cps(v), volume/mute, kit(id)/genre(id)/source(id) pick the drum kit, random() rolls a new pattern.

name: qualia.looper.*
doc: Looper transport: play/stop, record(on?), grab() (retroactive), freeze()/freezePop()/freezeRegrab()/freezeClear(), rigLevel(v), rigMute(on).

name: qualia.rig.*
doc: Pedalboard: toggle('earth'|'metal'|'delay'|'reverb'|...) flips a stage; param(stage, name, v) sets one knob, e.g. param('delay','mix',0.4).

name: qualia.vox.*
doc: Vocoder/harmonizer: start()/stop()/active(), mute(on), output(0..2), config(patch), harmony(on) toggles the harmonizer.

name: qualia.qualem.*
doc: Whole-scene snapshots: save(name) captures everything (quale, params, audio, pose, overlay, strudel code, sequencer...), recall(nameOrId) restores, list() enumerates.

name: qualia.perf.*
doc: Perf levers: fps(n) caps the viz render (0 = uncapped, 1–5 = strobe aesthetic), dpr(1.0–1.5) trades sharpness for GPU, reactFps(n), reactSmooth(0..1) de-jitters reactivity.

name: qualia.help
doc: Print this reference to the console, optionally filtered: qualia.help('glitch').
